revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:日河比売]]







{{infobox deity
| type = Shinto
| cult_centre = 
| father = {{ill|Kuraokami|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuraokami|qq=}}|mother = 
| children = {{ill|Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|ja|深淵之水夜礼花神|1=Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|qq=}}
| spouse = {{ill|Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|ja|布波能母遅久奴須奴神|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|qq=}}<ref>{{cite book | last=Herbert | first=J. | title=Shinto: At the Fountainhead of Japan | publisher=Taylor & Francis | series=Routledge Library Editions: Japan | year=2010 | isbn=978-1-136-90376-2 | url=https://books.google.com/books?id=Sg_JBQAAQBAJ&pg=PT402 | access-date=2020-11-21 | page=402}}</ref>
| gender = {{ill|female|qid=Q6581072|1=Female (gender)}}
| parents = {{ill|Kuraokami|qid=Q644201|1=Kuraokami}}
| consort = {{ill|Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|qid=Q65266248|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu}}
| offspring = {{ill|Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|qid=Q65272471|1=Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana}}
}}
{{ill|Hikawahime|ja|日河比売|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|qq=}}<ref>{{cite book |last=Chamberlain |first=B.H. |url=https://books.google.com/books?id=jf_PAgAAQBAJ |title=Kojiki: Records of Ancient Matters |publisher=Tuttle Publishing |year=2012 |isbn=978-1-4629-0511-9 |series=Tuttle Classics |access-date=2020-11-21}}</ref>  (日河比売 – Lady Spirit River / Lady Sunny River)<ref>{{Cite web |title=Hikawahime • . A History . . of Japan . 日本歴史 |url=https://historyofjapan.co.uk/wiki/hikawahime/ |access-date=2023-11-17 |website=. A History . . of Japan . 日本歴史 |language=en-GB}}</ref><ref name=":0">{{Cite book |last=Cranston |first=Edwin A. |url=https://books.google.com/books?id=KqWjwalbmx4C&dq=Hikawahime&pg=PA840 |title=A Waka Anthology: Volume One: The Gem-Glistening Cup |date=1998-03-01 |publisher=Stanford University Press |isbn=978-0-8047-3157-7 |language=en}}</ref> is a Japanese goddess associated with [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto]] and the {{ill|Izumo Province|en|Izumo Province|qid=Q582846|lt=Izumo Province|1=Izumo Province}}, and an ancestress of [[Ōkuninushi]].<ref name="fountainhead-local">{{cite book |last=Herbert |first=J. |url=https://books.google.com/books?id=Sg_JBQAAQBAJ&pg=PT402 |title=Shinto: At the Fountainhead of Japan |publisher=Taylor & Francis |year=2010 |isbn=978-1-136-90376-2 |series=Routledge Library Editions: Japan |page=402 |access-date=2020-11-21}}</ref>{{rp|278}} She is the daughter of {{ill|Kuraokami|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuraokami|qq=}}<ref>{{cite book|last=Ashkenazi |first=M. |url=https://books.google.com/books?id=gqs-y9R2AekC&pg=PA213 |title=Handbook of Japanese Mythology |publisher=ABC-CLIO |year=2003 |isbn=978-1-57607-467-1 |series=Handbooks of world mythology |page=213 |access-date=2020-11-21|qq=draft}}</ref><ref name=":0" />.

She is seen as a shrine maiden of a river, and worshipped at {{ill|Hikawa Shrine|en|lt=Hikawa Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikawa Shrine|qq=}}

==Family tree==
{{Eight generations of Izumo}}

==References==
{{reflist}}
{{Hikawa Faith}}
